projectDescription: A Codex plugin and skill that keeps project evidence, chat context, operator instructions, working hypotheses, and model assumptions in separate cognitive layers during an agentic session.
keyFeatures: Six-layer provenance classification system (L0–L3) for separating project evidence from chat, instructions, and model assumptions
Session-level cognitive-layer frame that stays active during reading, reasoning, planning, and writing
Optional PreToolUse hook that re-injects the compact classification frame before matched write tools (apply_patch, Write, Edit)
AGENTS.md authority countermeasure for correctly classifying runtime instruction-chain preludes
Inline tagging protocol ([L1], [L1A], [L2], [L2A], [L3]) for non-L0 content references
Dossier modes (A/B/C) for controlling how tightly provenance is documented before persistence
Decontamination checklist for detecting conversation residue, agent-control residue, version ghosts, and model-prior claims
Graceful fallback when the compact frame file is missing — fails visibly without blocking execution
publicApiSurface: Use Canon Boundary Guard for this session.
[features] hooks = true / plugin_hooks = true — Codex config keys
